name: French-Style Cream Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, stir together the cream cheese, margarine or butter, garlic, parsley, water, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, Herbes de Provence, and seasoning salt until well combined.
2. Cover the bowl and refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to develop.
3. To serve, garnish with fresh thyme if desired.
4. Serve with crackers.
